base_news_prompt.name: base_news
base_news_prompt.task: Analyze and rewrite only main idea and main facts.
base_news_prompt.analysis_requirements: Summarize key information, Determine emotional tone of the article, Identify the main points or facts and put it under Analize title.
base_news_prompt.rewrite_requirements: neutral tone, remove bias, keep clarity
base_news_prompt.tags: Add list of relevant keywords or phrases on your own point.
